data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Acceptance criteria met: (1) Light checklist distinguishes bash scripts (shellcheck-covered) from Python code (ruff-covered) with explicit sub-criteria for each file type, and a dedicated Linter Suppression Rules section names ruff, shellcheck, and mypy; (2) tests/agents/test-reviewer-light-checklist.sh validates structure and file-type-aware sub-criteria presence (12 assertions, all pass). Terminology coordinated with dso-bxng: both tiers use 'bash scripts / .sh files' and 'Python code / .py files' language; Standard tier can be a strict superset.
